mapper.select: SELECT id, question_id, user_id, content, vote_count, is_accepted, created_at, updated_at FROM answer WHERE question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY is_accepted DESC, vote_count DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT id, question_id, user_id, content, vote_count, is_accepted, created_at, updated_at FROM answer WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND is_accepted = true
